# claude-cli-calls

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Debug pane listing every single-shot `claude --print` call (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus) with prompt, output, source, and duration.
- Exports (web):
  - Values: `claudeCliCallsPane`
- Contributes:
  - `Pane.Register` `claude-cli-calls` (path `/debug/claude-cli-calls`)
  - `Debug.Item` "Claude CLI Calls"
  - `claudeCliCallsPane.open`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
